name: beta-portfolio-bach
description: Yusefs persönliches Portfolio — Vanilla TS/HTML/CSS, i18n DE/EN/AR, Admin-verwaltbar via Supabase.
author: Yusef Bach

scripts.build: node node_modules/typescript/lib/tsc.js && node scripts/prerender.js && mv website/js/sw.js website/sw.js && node scripts/build-lang-pages.mjs
scripts.build:all: node node_modules/typescript/lib/tsc.js && node scripts/build-projects.mjs && node scripts/build-roadmap.mjs && node scripts/build-thoughts.mjs && node scripts/build-github-activity.mjs && node scripts/build-media-manifest.mjs && node scripts/prerender.js && mv website/js/sw.js website/sw.js && node scripts/prerender-roadmap.js && node scripts/prerender-thoughts.js && node scripts/build-lang-pages.mjs && node scripts/build-sitemap.mjs
